_doc: Manual corrections to scripts/02_parse_candidates.py output. Key = canonical_id (firstname_lastname, deaccented lowercase). Any field set here overrides the auto-extracted value. Leave a field out to keep the auto value. Set a field to null to force clear.

abdellah_bougataya.name: Abdellah Bougataya
abdellah_bougataya.notes: Strong all-round; ArduPilot SITL + Gazebo + bare-metal firmware; AVIONX team (custom FC). No Teknofest involvement stated.

abdurakhmon_sobitkhanov.name: Abdurakhmon Sobitkhanov
abdurakhmon_sobitkhanov.notes: YTU Kontrol ve Otomasyon Müh, AGNO 3.53. Inner-loop PID + IMU; Simulink modeling.

ahmet_bugra.name: Ahmet Buğra Kallat
ahmet_bugra.notes: İTÜ Makine Müh; Teknofest Savaşan İHA 'En İyi Tasarım' + Serbest Görev İHA 3.lük; IMechE UAS Challenge finalist; avionics, autonomous systems, UAV design + control.

ali_assani.name: Ali Assani
ali_assani.notes: YTU Control & Automation graduate; MATLAB Mini Drone Competition Stage 1; aircraft control + MATLAB/Simulink exposure.

baris_agacik.name: Barış Ağacık
baris_agacik.notes: YTU Kontrol ve Otomasyon Müh (Lisans) 2022-2026, AGNO 3.03. MSC Nastran/Patran (software, not MSc).

emirhan_oskay.name: Emirhan Oskay
emirhan_oskay.notes: YTU. CV shows BSc AGNO 3.41 + ongoing MSc AGNO 3.56. 'Aday Mühendis' role at YTU; advisor at ITU.

enes_goktug.name: Enes Göktuğ Güneş
enes_goktug.notes: Fatih Sultan Mehmet Foundation U, Software Eng, 3rd year.

gonca_sude.name: Gonca Sude Şahbaz
gonca_sude.notes: BSc EEE Eskişehir Osmangazi 2021-2025 (GPA 2.99), now pursuing Yüksek Lisans. Multiple Teknofest events.

hacer_mehmet.name: Hacer Mehmet (Hajir Al-Nuaimi)
hacer_mehmet.notes: YTU Control Eng senior, expected Dec 2026. Senior thesis: VTOL UAV design & flight control. MATLAB MiniDrone Competition 2024.

hatixhe_merkaj.name: Hatixhe Merkaj
hatixhe_merkaj.notes: ITU Electronics & Communication 3rd year. ITU Hyperbee team; MBSE work.

huseyin_kirca.name: Hüseyin Kırca
huseyin_kirca.notes: Kocaeli Üni Mekatronik 3. sınıf. Computer vision focus. No Teknofest mention.

kubra_selin.name: Kübra Selin Yılmaz
kubra_selin.notes: 4th year, AGNO 3.14. MSC Nastran/Patran (modal analysis) — software, not academic degree.

mahmut_arpaci.name: Mahmut Arpacı
mahmut_arpaci.notes: Marmara Üni Mekatronik, Gano 3.03. Teknofest 2025 Finalist – Hava Savunma Sistemleri + İnsansız Su Altı.

melike_demirtas.name: Melike Demirtaş
melike_demirtas.notes: GTU EE 3rd year, GNO 2.94. Teknofest Savaşan İHA Aviyonik Lider 2025; 2024 Uluslararası İHA Türkiye Finalist. Portfolio is image-only PDF — review separately.

momen_aref.name: Momen Aref
momen_aref.notes: Yildiz Technical, Control & Automation 2021-2026. MPC/PID, embedded control.

mostafa_mahmoud.name: Mostafa Mahmoud
mostafa_mahmoud.notes: YTU Mechatronics 3rd year, GPA 3.35. Teknofest Air Defence + AI in Aviation competitions. Embedded systems focus, M2lab candidate.

muhammed_eyup.name: Muhammed Eyüp Rüzgar
muhammed_eyup.notes: YTU Kontrol & Otomasyon, GNO 2.64, started Oct 2021. Robot programming, PLC, HMI. No Teknofest involvement.

muhammed_kadir.name: Muhammed Kadir Aksoy
muhammed_kadir.notes: YTU Kontrol ve Otomasyon, son sınıf. YOLO26x-OBB benchmark work in portfolio.

nefise_yasar.name: Nefise Yaşar
nefise_yasar.notes: Kocaeli Üni Elektronik ve Haberleşme, 3.sınıf. Teknofest 2024 Savaşan İHA. Arduino projects.

nisa_nur.name: Nisa Nur Çolak
nisa_nur.notes: YTU Control & Automation; YTU Racing VCU team (Vehicle Control Unit support).

onur_can.name: Onur Can Sarı
onur_can.notes: Fırat Üni Bilgisayar Müh 3. sınıf. Markas Teknoloji (ROKETSAN sub) embedded software engineer; Ayyıldız air defense team. Teknofest Roket 'En İyi Takım' award. Very strong real-project record.

ruba_almadi.name: Ruba Almadi
ruba_almadi.notes: ITU Control & Automation, 3rd year (started Sep 2023). Teknofest 2024 2nd place + Steel award; Hyperloop team (3× 1st place internationally).

ruveyda_dilara.name: Rüveyda Dilara Gülbaş
ruveyda_dilara.notes: GNO 3.25/4. Teknofest 2024 Finalist – Tarımsal İKA (Unmanned Land Vehicle) Yarışması. Computer vision focus (YOLOv8/v10, DETR).

samet_atak.name: Samet Atak
samet_atak.notes: ITU Control & Automation 2022-; Erasmus at U. of Kassel; Yıldız Teknopark Machine ArGe. Finalist Teknofest TIKA Competition.

sefa_demirturk.name: Sefa Demirtürk
sefa_demirturk.notes: Gebze Technical University 2019-2026. ML/CV (OpenCV, YOLOv5, Pandas). Teknofest 2021 Autonomous Marine Cleaning Vehicle.

servet_haras.name: Servet Haras
servet_haras.notes: Kadir Has Üni EEE 3. sınıf, GPA 3.91 (full scholarship). Teknofest Otonom Robotaksi BMS / battery design.

simar_bayramusta.name: Simar Bayramusta
simar_bayramusta.notes: PDF appears image-only — text extraction yielded almost nothing. Re-OCR required before scoring. All numeric scores left at default heuristic (1) for now.

tasneem_mustafa.name: Tasneem Mustafa
tasneem_mustafa.notes: ITU Control & Automation Sep 2023-present; BAYKAR intern (Autopilot & Intelligent Systems Software, Jun 2026-). XENOS Robotaksi Teknofest Finalist 2024-25; MATLAB MiniDrone Finalist.

yehya_elnoti.name: Yehya Elnoti
yehya_elnoti.notes: Istanbul Aydın Üni Aerospace 3rd year, GPA 2.61. Teknofest Fighter UAV 2025 JETDOSE team lead (9 members) – finals.

yusuf_han.name: Yusuf Han Kızıltepe
yusuf_han.notes: Manisa Celal Bayar Üni EEE son sınıf. Altium PCB, STM32 embedded, BMS hardware. Limited GNC/UAV exposure.
